summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

Cyber Security Services (CSS) is an independent cybersecurity consulting firm based in Westerville, Ohio, that provides penetration testing, virtual CISO, SOC 2/HIPAA/PCI compliance, AI security, SOC, and incident response for U.S. organizations. They are an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework alongside Microsoft, IBM, DHS, and DoD, and have served Fortune 100 companies since 2014.
